programme.title: The Broadway Show With Tamsen Fadal
programme.desc: The Broadway opening of "The Fear of 13" with Adrien Brody and Tessa Thompson; Jessica Vosk ("Beaches"); Rose Byrne and Kelli O'Hara celebrate the Broadway opening of "Fallen Angels"; Nicholas Christopher ("Chess"); inside the Broadway opening of "Proof"; a behind-the-scenes look at David Korins' set for "Dog Day Afternoon"; the opening night of "Schmigadoon.".

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Car Repair Secrets!
programme.desc: Save thousands on car repairs.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: 9/11 Survivors Speak Up
programme.desc: Hear from survivors, first responders and advocates about the devastating impact of 9/11 toxins and the lifetime benefits available; learning about your rights and protection under the law.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR O'Reilly Auto Parts Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR O'Reilly Auto Parts Series reaches Alabama for a race at Talladega Superspeedway. Taylor Gray looks to build on his season-opening success, while Justin Allgaier seeks to maintain his position at the top of the series standings.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph Kramden is a perpetually flustered but eternally optimistic New York City bus driver living with his wife, Alice, in a small Brooklyn apartment. Ralph's best friend is sanitation worker Ed Norton, who lives in the same building with wife Trixie.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Jack Hibbs
programme.desc: Real Life Ministry's Pastor Jack Hibbs proclaims Biblical truth impacting culture, with a clear understanding of God's word.

programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Vision Television host Gerald Flurry presents a weekly analysis of world events. Through the perspective of biblical prophecy, Flurry delivers messages of warning, often about issues concerning the growing power and influence of the European Union. From the studios of the Philadelphia Church of God, "The Key of David" attempts to stand out among today's modern devotional programming. Its viewers have referred to the program as frank, bold and rational without an overt emotional sentimentality.

programme.title: The Hill Sunday With Chris Stirewalt
programme.desc: Featuring a variety of politicians and newsmakers discussing the latest political news from the nation's capital.

programme.desc: Save thousands on car repairs.

programme.title: How to Build a Rock Solid Retirement

programme.title: Police 24/7: On the Beat
programme.sub-title: There's a Needle on the Tire
programme.desc: A raw, unfiltered look into the world of sheriff and police departments across the United States as they serve and protect at all costs.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: In the fast-paced world of NASCAR, a rivalry brews between rookie hotshot Cole Trickle (Tom Cruise) and veteran racer Rowdy Burns (Michael Rooker). When both of them are seriously injured in competition, the former bitter rivals become close friends. With Cole's spirits restored by a romance with neurosurgeon Dr. Claire Lewicki (Nicole Kidman), and Rowdy still sidelined by injuries, Cole decides to race Rowdy's car in the Daytona 500 against underhanded newcomer Russ Wheeler (Cary Elwes).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
